ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the plant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the plant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the plant is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the plant is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the plant is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the plant */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the plant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor within the plant */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the data was collected */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the climate metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the climate metric */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the data validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the climate metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the alert was triggered */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that triggered the alert */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, engineer, operator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the climate data */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant accessed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the sensor reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the climate metric */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of data validation rule (e.g., threshold, range) */,
  "rule_value" REAL /* Value of the data validation rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES climate_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, replacement) */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for the maintenance (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
